title: Enchantment Peek
description: Stop gambling on your enchantments! See exactly what you're getting before you click. Reveal all enchantments before.
body:
# What It Does:
Enchantment Peek is a utility mod that modifies the enchanting table interface. It removes the vanilla behavior of showing one guaranteed enchantment followed by ...? and instead displays a full list of every enchantment you will receive for that cost.

To use it, simply hover your mouse over an enchantment option in the table. The tooltip will show the complete results, allowing you to make an informed decision before spending your experience levels.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3aed2538da08597951fefd8dfbb0757ee7daafb.png)

# Installation & Requirements
This mod communicates between the server and the client to function, which affects how it must be installed.

## Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API.

In a single-player world, this works automatically out of the box because your computer acts as both the client and the server.

Installation: This mod must be installed on both the server and the client.

For a multiplayer server, the mod's .jar file must be in the mods folder on the server itself, AND in the mods folder of every player who wants to see the enchantments.
